# Magnum Custom Publishing

> Professional book publishing services company based in New Delhi, India. Specialising in ghostwriting, editing, layout design, cover design, and end-to-end custom publishing since 2005. Clients include individual authors, corporate houses, government agencies, think tanks, NGOs, and international organisations.

Magnum Custom Publishing is led by Arvind Passey and has produced hundreds of publications across a wide range of genres and formats over two decades. Services are delivered with a focus on quality, precision, and timeliness.

Contact: arvind@magnumcustompublishing.com | +91 9811097054 (also WhatsApp) | C-27-B Gangotri Enclave, Alaknanda, New Delhi 110019, India

## Services

- [Ghostwriting & Writing Services](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/services/ghostwriting): Full-length book writing, content development, and author collaboration for individuals and organisations.
- [Editing & Proofreading](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/services/editing): Developmental editing, copy editing, line editing, and proofreading to publication standard.
- [Layout & Design](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/services/layout-design): Interior book layout, typesetting, and formatting for print and digital formats.
- [Cover Design](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/services/cover-design): Custom book cover design for all genres and markets.
- [All Services](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/services): Overview of all publishing services offered.

## Portfolio

- [Portfolio Overview](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/portfolio): Browse all published work across categories.
- [Government of India Publications](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/portfolio/government-of-india): Books and reports produced for central government ministries and departments.
- [Think Tanks, Defence & Security](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/portfolio/think-tanks-defence-security): Publications for policy research organisations and defence think tanks.
- [Global Consultants & Trade Organisations](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/portfolio/global-consultants-trade): Reports and books for international consulting and trade bodies.
- [Corporate Social Responsibility](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/portfolio/csr): CSR reports and impact publications for corporate clients.
- [Climate Change Mitigation & Adaptation](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/portfolio/climate-change): Publications focused on environmental policy and climate action.
- [Foreign Language Publications](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/portfolio/foreign-languages): Books produced in multiple languages beyond English.
- [School Books](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/portfolio/school-books): Educational textbooks and supplementary material for schools.
- [Children's Books in Regional Languages](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/portfolio/childrens-books-regional-languages): Children's titles published in Indian regional languages.
- [Self-Publishing Projects](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/portfolio/self-publishing): End-to-end support for independent authors choosing to self-publish.

## Optional

- [About Magnum Custom Publishing](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/about): Company background, founding story, team, and areas of expertise.
- [Client Testimonials](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/testimonials): Reviews and feedback from authors, corporates, and government clients.
- [Contact](https://magnumcustompublishing.com/contact): Address, phone, email, and WhatsApp details for getting in touch.
